violations.text: The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the kitchen 3-bay sink and dishwasher. Establishment is to obtain test strips. New Violation. Correct By: 06/11/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment shall be cleaned at a frequency necessary to prevent the accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 06/11/2025
